era_resolution: Diplomatic negotiations and United Nations intervention
modern_resolution: Implementation of AI-driven maritime traffic management and advanced naval surveillance systems

biblical_tie.context: Blessed are the peacemakers, for they shall be called sons of God

protocol: UESP Apex Engine Recommendation: Implement multi-nation cooperative efforts and AI-assisted monitoring to mitigate risk of conflict in the Strait of Hormuz, ensuring free flow of international maritime trade and reducing systemic friction.
